title: cycnogeton lineare
intro: Cycnogeton lineare, also known as the New Zealand bulrush or Koheriki in Maori, is a type of aquatic plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Cycnogeton lineare include its ability to reduce swelling and promote healing, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and salves that can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
